works.title: How QuickAid Works
works.p: Getting help is simple and fast. Follow these three steps to access emergency assistance.

steps.title: Tap Emergency Button
steps.description: Press the emergency button and input your email address into our quick dialog box menu.

steps.title: Automatic Dispatch
steps.description: Have an ambulance dispatched to you or you will receive directions to the nearest hospitals in your vicinity.

steps.title: Get Help Fast
steps.description: Receive immediate first-aid guidance while help is on the way. Track response status in real-time.
